test.command: uv run pytest tests/test_artifact.py tests/test_ast_parser.py tests/test_binding.py tests/test_cli.py tests/test_config.py tests/test_dataset.py tests/test_docker_runner.py tests/test_environments.py tests/test_harness.py tests/test_interfaces.py tests/test_local_runner.py tests/test_agent.py tests/test_mutation.py tests/test_package.py tests/test_registry.py tests/test_result_parser.py tests/test_schemas.py tests/test_task_pipeline.py tests/test_telemetry.py tests/test_tools.py -x -q
test.note: 797 tests passed. Pre-existing bench/ integration tests excluded due to missing openai dependency (unrelated to synthesis features).

lint.command: uv run ruff check src/grist_mill/ && uv run ruff format --check src/grist_mill/
lint.note: One import sorting issue in src/grist_mill/tools/__init__.py was auto-fixed with ruff --fix.

nonBlockingIssues.description: Dead code: _extract_parameters_text defined but never called
Redundant shebang pattern in _SHEBANG_MAP (rscript/Rscript with IGNORECASE)
test_parse_class checks methods in FUNCTION list but doesn't assert CLASS node
Dead code: apply_mutation_to_string defined but never used/exported/tested
Operator overlap between logic_bug and edge_case mutators produces task redundancy
Substring matching in operator_map makes '>=' entry effectively dead
In-place dict mutation in yaml_import.py when uppercasing difficulty
overwrite=False logic skips MEDIUM/HARD tasks regardless of origin
O(n^2) decontamination complexity — acceptable now, LSH for >1000 tasks
Dead code: unused MutationPipeline instance in run()

appliedUpdates.description: Added test_grist_mill command for running only grist-mill tests (excludes pre-existing bench/ tests that fail on missing openai dep)
appliedUpdates.sourceFeature: multiple reviewers flagged test_all command failure

appliedUpdates.description: Updated environment.md to clarify tree-sitter-language-pack is a core dependency (not optional synthesis extra)

Added synthesis module details to architecture.md: tasks/ module structure (ast_parser, mutation, pipeline), dataset/ module details (Dataset vs DatasetVersion design, difficulty thresholds, decontamination complexity notes)

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update type checking guidance: note that 'ty check .' has pre-existing errors in bench/, scripts/, and legacy test directories. Workers should use 'ty check src/grist_mill/' for grist-mill code.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Multiple workers (m4-ast-parser, m4-task-mutation-pipeline) deviated from verification steps to run 'ty check src/grist_mill/' due to pre-existing errors outside grist-mill.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update testing guidance: note that the full test suite (test_all) includes pre-existing bench/ tests that fail due to missing openai dependency. Workers should use test_grist_mill command for validation.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: All 4 synthesis feature reviewers and the scrutiny validator encountered failures with test_all due to pre-existing bench/ tests importing openai module which is not installed.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update backend-worker skill verification steps: if 'pytest tests/ -m ...' fails on pre-existing bench/ tests, fall back to test_grist_mill command or targeted test files.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: m4-task-pipeline-end-to-end reviewer noted worker had to deviate from SKILL.md step 6 to run targeted tests.

rejectedObservations.observation: No changes needed to services.yaml (m4-task-mutation-pipeline reviewer)
rejectedObservations.reason: Superseded — we did add test_grist_mill command based on other reviewers' observations

rejectedObservations.observation: No change needed to AGENTS.md for __import__ usage (m4-task-pipeline-end-to-end reviewer)
rejectedObservations.reason: This is a minor code quality issue already captured in non-blocking issues, not a guidance gap

rejectedObservations.observation: No change needed to services.yaml for dataset-specific test command (m4-dataset-management reviewer)
rejectedObservations.reason: Superseded — test_grist_mill command covers all grist-mill tests including dataset
